description: A stylish, high-fashion choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek design, cork heel and striped fabric with snake skin effect, this pair will look great with day or party wear & ndash wear it to add a classy touch to your outfit.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.Heel: 2.5"UpperTextile footbed with a synthetic leather panel at heel, ergonomically curved and lightly padded for absolute comfort and styleMidfoot straps in synthetic leather and striped snake skin look fabricMidsoleCork midsole in semi wedge shapeOutsoleDurable outsole with grooves at heel for gripReinforced heel cap for heel durabilitySandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
